headline: Shares of oil and gas-related companies are trading higher as Middle East tensions and low movement in the Strait of Hormuz continue to keep energy prices elevated.
summary: Shares of oil and gas-related companies are trading higher as Middle East tensions and low movement in the Strait of Hormuz continue to keep energy prices elevated.

raw.headline: Shares of oil and gas-related companies are trading higher as Middle East tensions and low movement in the Strait of Hormuz continue to keep energy prices elevated.

headline: Oil Above $90, Pump Above $4 — And 7 Energy Stocks Still Trading At A Wide Discount
summary: Oil surged 38% from its pre-war level of $65, gas jumped from $2.98 to $4.09, and Kpler data shows Hormuz flows are still severely disrupted. Yet seven major energy stocks still price in a resolution that hasn't arrived — trading at 7x to 11x forward P/E. Is this a generational buying opportunity, or a value trap?
